rationale: The citing paper is an editorial content-coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), and its stated intellectual grounding highlights other historical review papers, not this 2019 hybrid conjoint method paper. The only pair-specific evidence is a single DOI match with no title/context snippet in the matched reference record, so we cannot tell whether this is merely an included/example article or substantively discussed. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to confidently drop or keep.
